title: DPE stderr event
description: Typed events emitted to stderr by tool framework runtimes. One JSON object per line. Discriminated by the `type` field. Every framework (Rust / TS / Python) MUST emit exactly these shapes; the per-language conformance test validates this.

log.title: log
log.description: Structured log line emitted by ctx.log(msg, level). Tool authors may attach arbitrary extra fields.

error.title: error
error.description: Per-row error from ctx.error(v, msg). Carries the original input envelope's id/src so the runner can reconstruct provenance. The runner enriches the on-disk form with `t` (ms since epoch) and `sid` (stage id) when persisting to <session>/logs/<stage>_errors.log so dpe log can time-merge with logs.

input.title: input
input.description: Emitted by the framework runtime per envelope read from stdin, BEFORE the processor runs. Lets the runner count rows_in for stages that never call ctx.output() (pass-through tools, terminal sinks). Added in v2.0.2.

trace.title: trace
trace.description: Merged trace event emitted by the framework on every ctx.output() (channel=data) or ctx.meta() (channel=meta). The runner appends data-channel traces to the session trace log; tool code never emits this directly. Missing `channel` is treated as data for backward compatibility with v2.0.1 tools.

stats.title: stats
stats.description: Free-form per-tool statistics emitted by ctx.stats(obj). Schema only fixes the discriminator; everything else is tool-specific.
